limitations: This is a machine inventory, not an educational content artifact.
No internet crawl or new source ingestion was performed.
Evidence references identify local artifacts only; content claims require later review.

evidence_refs.basis: active AP coverage gap report exists

coverage_items.topic: CP tutorial and ABPath crosswalk surface

gap_items.topic: AP active coverage gaps need local source mapping
gap_items.expected_coverage: Every AP active coverage gap should map to local curriculum, image, question, or escalation evidence.
gap_items.observed_coverage: Gap reports exist, but this inventory has not yet mapped each gap to local source candidates.
gap_items.source_priority: existing curriculum, local corpus, local KB
gap_items.recommended_next_action: Run a local source mapping tranche against reports/ap_spec_active_coverage_gap.json and reports/ap_gap_closure_plan.json.

gap_items.expected_coverage: Clinical chemistry, coagulation, statistics, informatics, molecular diagnostics, transfusion medicine, lab management, physiology, and biochemistry should have worked-example coverage.
gap_items.observed_coverage: CP tutorial and curriculum surfaces exist, but worked-example parity has not been inventoried topic by topic.
gap_items.recommended_next_action: Map CP tutorial and curriculum artifacts to required worked-example domains before generating examples.

gap_items.expected_coverage: Each topic should have at least five board-style questions when source evidence supports it.
gap_items.observed_coverage: Local tutorial and lecture surfaces include question support, but topic-level MCQ density is not proven for every ABPath topic.
gap_items.recommended_next_action: Compute topic-level MCQ counts from local lecture/tutorial manifests and mark zero-count topics.

gap_items.expected_coverage: Each image module should declare gross, low power, medium power, and high power coverage when applicable.
gap_items.observed_coverage: Reference image manifests exist, but image-to-topic requirement coverage is not yet normalized in this inventory.
gap_items.recommended_next_action: Map local image manifests to AP topics and mark missing magnification classes.

gap_items.expected_coverage: Relevant AP and CP entities should expose molecular testing, interpretation, and report consequence where applicable.
gap_items.observed_coverage: Molecular concepts are present in local surfaces, but topic-level completeness is not proven.
gap_items.recommended_next_action: Create a local-only molecular coverage crosswalk from lecture contracts, tutorial crosswalks, and active curriculum declarations.

gap_items.expected_coverage: Curriculum entries should connect diagnosis, ancillary studies, reporting consequence, and management implications when relevant.
gap_items.observed_coverage: Management/informatics and sign-out artifacts exist, but complete cross-topic implication coverage is not proven.
gap_items.recommended_next_action: Map local sign-out, tutorial, and curriculum artifacts to management/reporting implication fields.

weak_items.expected_coverage: Each diagnostic entity should expose differential diagnosis and discriminating features.
weak_items.observed_coverage: Differential diagnosis appears in app surfaces, but entity-level breadth and depth are not yet measured.
weak_items.recommended_next_action: Extract local entity-level differential fields into a coverage matrix before content generation.

weak_items.expected_coverage: Each promoted curriculum artifact should retain source path, provenance, and review status.
weak_items.observed_coverage: Source/reference artifacts exist, but provenance completeness is not yet checked across all curriculum surfaces.
weak_items.recommended_next_action: Run a local provenance completeness pass over lecture, tutorial, image, and report manifests.

duplicate_items.topic: Reference library duplicate or conflicting coverage
duplicate_items.expected_coverage: Reference image/content routes should avoid conflicting duplicate topic mappings.
duplicate_items.observed_coverage: Multiple local reference-library surfaces exist; duplicate-topic reconciliation has not been proven.
duplicate_items.recommended_next_action: Compare local reference-library manifests and validated mappings before adding new images or routes.

source_candidates.use: Map existing AP, CP, tutorial, and material-expansion reports before generating new material.
Map lecture contracts and normalized lecture content to expected ABPath topics.
Map tutorial crosswalks, MCQs, flashcards, and validated mappings to gap items.
Map image manifests to topic/image requirement gaps without importing new files.
Resolve local storage and repo roots before searching external drives or network mounts.

human_escalations.reason: Human reviewer should confirm whether machine-mapped AP gaps are true gaps before gap closure planning.
human_escalations.recommended_reviewer: pathology faculty or designated curriculum owner

human_escalations.reason: Human reviewer should prioritize which CP worked-example domains matter first for resident workflow.
Human reviewer should approve image provenance and route mappings before any image is promoted as teaching truth.
